defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Human Ecology Alumni Affairs and Development Office records, #23-11-4061. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 1, 2, and 10 restricted to the permission of the office of origin with the exception of records of deceased alumni.

did.unittitle: Doyle, Raachel - GlamourGals Outreach - Trip to Ohio
Evan, Lt. Col. Nannie R. MS
Communications Study - Phase I - Alumni Perceptions
Alumni Survey - Data Documentation Donor and Non-Donor Weighted Sample
Historical background on named fellowships, scholarships and grants in alphabetical order
